-->|extract| SM[Semantic Memory]\n  SC -->|evict| DEL[Deleted]\n"}],"\n",["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Agent observes"}]," an event, conversation turn, or tool result"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Working Memory"}]," stores the raw entry with metadata"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Indices"}]," are updated synchronously (vector + FTS5)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Sleep Consolidator"}]," (async) processes entries during sleep cycles"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Promotion"}]," moves high-importance entries to Episodic Memory"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Extraction"}]," pulls structured facts into Semantic Memory"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Eviction"}]," removes low-importance entries per policy"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Read Graph]\n  VI -->|scores| RF[Rank Fusion]\n  FI -->|scores| RF\n  TG -->|triples| RF\n  RF -->|results| WM[Working Memory]\n  WM -->|context| a:["$","$L7",null,{"chart":"\nflowchart TD\n  START[Sleep Cycle Trigger] -->|every N seconds| WM2[Scan Working Memory]\n  WM2 -->|select| CAND[Candidates]\n  CAND -->|importance &gt; threshold| PROMOTE[Promote to Episodic]\n  CAND -->|extractable facts| EXTRACT[Extract to Semantic]\n  CAND -->|age &gt; limit| EVICT[Evict]\n  PROMOTE --> COMPRESS[AAAK Compress]\n  COMPRESS --> EM2[Episodic Memory]\n  EXTRACT --> TG2[Temporal Graph]\n  EVICT --> DEL[Remove]\n"}]
b:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Event Lifecycle"}]
c:["$","p",null,{"children":"| Stage | Location | Trigger | Duration |\n|-------|----------|---------|----------|\n| Ingestion | Working Memory | Agent observation | Immediate |\n| Indexing | Vector + FTS5 | Write completion | <50ms |\n| Consolidation | Episodic + Semantic | Sleep cycle | Minutes to hours |\n| Retrieval | Working Memory | Agent query | <100ms |\n| Eviction | Deleted | Retention policy | Configurable |"}]
